elements.original_description: A cartoon-style hand pointing directly at the viewer, with a friendly smiley face on the palm. The background is pure white. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D cartoon-style illustration of a hand pointing directly at the viewer, with a friendly, cheerful smiley face drawn on the palm. Pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, bright and inviting colors, no shading or gradients. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
